results.title: Veteran Malayalam Actor Salim Kumar Hospitalised, Placed On Ventilator Support
results.description: Veteran Malayalam actor Salim Kumar has been hospitalised in Kochi and placed on ventilator support. The National Award-winning actor is undergoing treatment with his condition closely checked by doctors.

results.title: Electric Worker Dies After Collapse on Duty in Ganjam
results.description: A contract worker in Odisha’s Ganjam district collapsed while repairing an electric pole and died at Bhanjanagar hospital on Friday afternoon. The deceased, identified as Durga Madhab Jena, had worked in the Energy Department as a contractual employee for nearly 18 years.
